ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator for the survey */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the survey */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number for the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter */,
  "filter_wavelength" TEXT /* Wavelength range of the filter */,
  "filter_transmission" TEXT /* Transmission curve of the filter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stack_types" (
  "stack_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each stack type */,
  "stack_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the stack type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stack type */,
  "stack_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stack type */,
  "processing_software" TEXT /* Software used for processing the stack type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stack_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_stacks" (
  "stack_image_id" TEXT /* Unique stack identifier */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Internal database batch identifier */,
  "survey_id" TEXT /* Survey identifier */,
  "filter_id" TEXT /* Filter identifier */,
  "stack_type_id" TEXT /* Stack type identifier */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the image stack */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the image stack */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Processing status of the image stack */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the image stack */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Observation date of the image stack */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stack_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_stacks_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_stacks_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_stacks_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_stacks_stack_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("stack_type_id") REFERENCES stack_types ("stack_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the batch */,
  "processing_pipeline" TEXT /* Pipeline used for processing the batch */,
  "processing_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used during processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_stack_id" TEXT /* ID of the image stack being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image stack */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image stack was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used for accessing the data */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_stack_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_stack_id") REFERENCES image_stacks ("stack_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "image_stack_id" TEXT /* ID of the image stack the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_image_stack_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_stack_id") REFERENCES image_stacks ("stack_image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "image_stack_id" TEXT /* ID of the image stack the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_image_stack_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_stack_id") REFERENCES image_stacks ("stack_image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_stack_id" TEXT /* ID of the image stack the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_author" TEXT /* Author of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_image_stack_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_stack_id") REFERENCES image_stacks ("stack_image_id")
)
